DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Marc N. Zimmerman, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. Per order of the Presiding Judge, Judge Miller heard this demurrer. DEFENDANT MAXWELL MENG, M.D.'S DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT is sustained, with 20 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR# 8098.

MOTION TO STRIKE COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Apr-29-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances:
Marc N. Zimmerman, Esq. of Hassard Bonnington LLP, Tel. 415.288.9800, for defendant and moving party;
No other appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted the tentative ruling which was not contested. Per order of the Presiding Judge, Judge Miller heard this motion to strike. DEFENDANT MAXWELL MENG, M.D.'S MOTION TO STRIKE PORTIONS OF THE COMPLAINT is granted, with 20 days leave to amend. No opposition filed. ORDER SIGNED. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Giselle Casey CSR# 8098.
